texto: A professional is a man who can do his job when he doesn't feel like it
autor: an amateur is one who can't when he does feel like it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a an amateur is one who can't when he does feel like it.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “A professional is a man who can do his job when he doesn't feel like it” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, james-agate, professional pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
